summary: Comprehensive testing of the Teacher Portal feature. All 25 backend tests passed and all frontend UI tests passed. Teacher registration, login, classroom sessions CRUD, student join, and analytics all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed teacher accounts and classroom sessions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher Portal feature fully tested. All CRUD operations for classroom sessions work. Student join via 6-digit code works. Analytics aggregation from students, assessments, and read_logs works. Guardian accounts receive 403 when trying to access teacher endpoints. Frontend TeacherLogin, TeacherRegister, TeacherPortal pages all render correctly with Sessions and Analytics tabs.

backend_api_tests: Teacher registration with role=teacher returns 200 and role in response
Duplicate teacher email registration fails with 400
Teacher login returns access_token and user.role=teacher
Teacher login with invalid credentials returns 401
Login response includes role field
Create classroom session returns 200 with 6-digit session_code
List classroom sessions returns teacher's sessions only
Get session by ID returns full session details
Start session changes status to 'active'
End session changes status to 'completed'
Create session requires authentication (returns 401/403)
List sessions requires authentication (returns 401/403)
Student join session via code returns 200
Student join with invalid code returns 404
Student already joined returns 200 with 'Already joined'
Join with invalid student ID returns 404
Get session analytics returns session, students, class_summary
Analytics requires authentication
Analytics for empty session returns zero values
Guardian cannot create session (403)
Guardian cannot list sessions (403)
Guardian cannot start session (403)
Guardian cannot end session (403)
Guardian cannot get analytics (403)
Join existing session by code works
frontend_ui_tests: Landing page has Teacher Login button (data-testid='teacher-login-link')
Teacher Login page renders with email/password inputs and submit button
Teacher Register page renders with all form fields
Teacher registration flow works - redirects to Teacher Portal
Teacher Portal loads with Sessions and Analytics tabs
Create Session modal opens and accepts title/description
Session creation shows session card with code, status, student count
Session detail view shows join code, roster, start/end buttons
Start session changes status to ACTIVE and shows END SESSION button
Analytics tab shows session cards with VIEW ANALYTICS button
Analytics detail shows 4 summary stats (students, accuracy, mastered, reading)
Analytics detail shows empty state when no student data
Back buttons work in session detail and analytics detail views
